arts.ttl: West Ham 1-1 Southampton: Chelsea loanee Lesley Ugochukwu's extra-time equaliser denies Hammers first win since February after Jarrod Bowen opener
arts.sum: Southampton snatched a late point at the London Stadium through Chelsea loanee Lesley Ugochukwu, denying the hosts a first Premier League win since February.

arts.ttl: Fantasy Challenge: Double points in Fulham v Chelsea
arts.sum: Therefore managers will need to decide between investing in these players, investing in those teams like Liverpool who have an excellent single-Gameweek fixture and won't score double points or opting for Chelsea and Fulham assets who will have their points doubled. This week, players from the west London derby between Fulham and Chelsea will score DOUBLE points, with managers selecting a 5-a-side team using an unlimited budget.

arts.ttl: Chelsea team Maresca must pick vs Fulham amid Palmer decision as James dropped
arts.sum: Bobby's XI: Sanchez; Gusto, Chalobah, Colwill, Cucurella; Caicedo, Fernandez; Madueke, Palmer, Sancho; Jackson. The Blues were 3-0 up against their opponents after the first clash, but the likes of Nicolas Jackson, Cole Palmer and Reece James all started the game, with Maresca providing some insight into his selection.

arts.ttl: Fabrizio Romano shares what he's now hearing about Enzo Maresca's future at Chelsea

arts.ttl: Defender’s future at Fulham under review after “best season of his career” – Saudi Arabia interest made known
arts.sum: Joseph Yobo has touched on Calvin Bassey’s future at Fulham after admitting that his compatriot is having the “best season of his career”. The former Everton man was interviewed by Africa Foot, who have even detailed apparent interest in the defender from Al Hilal of the Saudi Pro League. arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Enzo Maresca 'pressurising' Blues board to win £30m striker battle
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca is allegedly pressurising the Chelsea board to win the race for an in-demand Premier League striker during the summer transfer window.
